# AgentCribs

AgentCribs is a curated PWV community project for founders, developers, and hackers building tools and workflows for agentic software development. It is publicly soft launching with an in-person event on May 6, 2026 in San Francisco, featuring a fireside chat between Peter Levine of a16z and Tom Preston-Werner, GitHub co-founder and PWV founder/investor.

## Links

- Homepage: https://agentcribs.com/
- Apply: https://agentcribs.com/apply
- PWV: https://pwv.com/
- PWV AgentCribs post: coming soon
